title: Karakudi Ilavarasi Lyrics Kalakalappu 2
stanzas:
karakudi ilavarasi
en nenja thaakura maharasi
thoothukudi varagarasi
nee kaaya podura ena alasi.

kannu
adhu gun-u madhiri
kannam
adhu bannu madhiri
paarvai
adhu jinnu madhiri
podhai uyethudhudaa

mooku
adhu gulfi madhiri
udhadu
adhu burgi madhiri
ponnu
iva vera madhiri
enna konnaadaa

masakkiye masakkiye
mayangi naanum ponenadi
sirikkiye sirikkiye
sethari naanum ponenadi (2)

yendi yendi
ottu moththa
ulaga azhagaellaam
oruthi mattum vachirukkiye

emmanasa kaimaa panni
kurumaa pola kothikka
nee vittuputtiye

all in all azhaguraja
naanthaan ammaadi
un manasa repair aakka
porandha killaadi.

paartha udane pulse-a yethi
poraale emmaa emmaadi
GPSu illaamale varuven
naan un pinnaadi.

karakudi ilavarasi
en nenja thaakura maharasi
thoothukudi varagarasi
nee kaaya podura ena alasi. (2)

sethari naanum ponenadi

nee vittuputtiye

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Karakudi Ilavarasi?

The song is a peppy and energetic dance number that adds a fun element to the movie.

Who are the singers of Karakudi Ilavarasi?

The song is sung by Jassie Gift and Sudharsan Ashok.

What is the context of the song in Kalakalappu 2?

The song is featured in a lively and comedic setting, enhancing the film's entertaining vibe.

When was Karakudi Ilavarasi released?

The song was released in 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Karakudi Ilavarasi from the movie Kalakalappu 2 is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly complements the film's comedic and lively atmosphere. Sung by Jassie Gift and Sudharsan Ashok, it features catchy lyrics and upbeat music that make it an ideal choice for parties and celebrations. The song captures the essence of fun and joy, encouraging listeners to dance along. Its playful tone and dynamic rhythm contribute to the overall entertainment value of the movie.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Karakudi Ilavarasi from the hilarious movie Kalakalappu 2. This energetic track features the vibrant vocals of Jassie Gift and Sudharsan Ashok, making it a perfect party anthem. Dive into the fun and lively beats that will surely lift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: The princess of Karakudi, you rule my heart. The queen of Thoothukudi, why are you making me suffer?
Your eyes are like a gun, your cheeks are like a bun, your gaze is like a gin, making me feel high.
Your nose is like a cone, your lips are like a burger, this girl is different, what have you done to me?
I was mesmerized and lost myself, I was laughing and got defeated.
Why, why did you gather all the beauty of the world in one person?
You made my heart restless like a goat, making it boil like a pot.
The moment I saw you, my pulse raced. I will follow you without a GPS.
The princess of Karakudi, you rule my heart. The queen of Thoothukudi, why are you making me suffer?
